definition:
1. poured, shed , αἷμα χυτόν blood shed , (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
2. of dry things, shot out, heaped up , χυτὴ γαῖα a mound of  earth, a sepulchral mound, (Homer):—;as Substantive, χυτός, οῦ, = χῶμα, a mound, bank, dike , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. melted , ἀρτήματα λίθινα χυτά pendants of melted  stone, (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. generally, liquid, flowing , [Refs 5th c.BC, variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
